role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, climate, and settlement patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed tree species (spruce) and biome types.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road surface, utility poles, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural styles and camera generation details.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Lithuania. The agents adhered to their roles, and the meta/regulatory agents provided strong, image-grounded evidence (concrete poles, brick style) that drove the correct decision.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat terrain and mixed vegetation match image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Identification of spruce and deciduous trees matches image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Concrete poles and road condition accurately described.
